name: Sarah Johnson
subject: Portfolio Development
review: This course completely transformed my design skills. The mentorship was incredible and I landed my first design job within 2 months of completing the program.

name: Michael Chen
subject: Design Fundamentals
review: Amazing course structure! The practical projects helped me build a portfolio that impressed employers. Highly recommend for beginners.

name: Emily Rodriguez
subject: Freelance Mentorship
review: The freelance mentorship was a game-changer. I learned how to price my work and find clients. Now I'm running my own design business successfully.

name: David Kim
subject: Design Tools
review: Great introduction to design tools and principles. The no-coding approach made it accessible for someone with zero technical background like me.

name: Lisa Thompson
subject: Career Transition
review: Switched from marketing to UX design thanks to this course. The mentors provided excellent guidance throughout my career transition journey.

name: Alex Martinez
subject: Portfolio Building
review: The portfolio building section was outstanding. I created 3 professional projects that helped me stand out in job interviews.
